# zstack_baremetal_chassis (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage baremetal chassis in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_uuid` (String) The cluster UUID for the chassis.
- `ipmi_address` (String) The IPMI address.
- `ipmi_password` (String, Sensitive) The IPMI password.
- `ipmi_username` (String) The IPMI username.
- `name` (String) The name of the baremetal chassis.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the baremetal chassis.
- `ipmi_port` (Number) The IPMI port.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the chassis.
- `status` (String) The status of the chassis.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the baremetal chassis.
- `zone_uuid` (String) The zone UUID.
